subcodes.first_line: O people of Ha and Mim! Hearken unto the Call of God, the All-Powerful, the All-Knowing, the All-Wise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اهل ها و میم اسمعوا ندآءالله المقتدر العلیم الحکیم
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
